headline: Is Qualcomm Ready for Primetime? What the Technicals Say.
summary: Qualcomm stock is gaining momentum after lagging the semiconductor sector, with technical signals pointing to a potential breakout.

headline: Four Titans Report, Oil Hits $120, and Powell Draws a Line in the Sand
summary: If you went to bed early on Wednesday, you missed a lot. Four of the biggest companies in the world reported quarterly earnings within minutes of each other and all four beat expectations. That alone would have made it a notable session. But layered on top of that was oil surging near $120 a barrel, a Federal Reserve meeting, and a Fed chair who refused to leave. Quiet, it was not.

raw.headline: Four Titans Report, Oil Hits $120, and Powell Draws a Line in the Sand
raw.summary: If you went to bed early on Wednesday, you missed a lot. headline: NXP Semiconductors (NXP) Climbs to All-Time High as Earnings Soar 129%
summary: NXP Semiconductors NV (NASDAQ:NXPI) is one of the 10 Stocks Notching Impressive Double-Digit Gains. NXP Semiconductors soared to a fresh all-time high on Wednesday, as investors cheered its stellar earnings performance in the first quarter of the year, with profits more-than-doubling and cracking past the $1 billion level, thanks to a strong demand from AI. […]
